name: open-kioku
description: Local-first code intelligence MCP for Cursor. Indexes your codebase with Tree-sitter symbol parsing, SQLite dependency graph, and BM25 full-text search — all on your machine. Precise code search, symbol navigation, blast-radius analysis, and patch planning. No cloud. No embeddings API. No data leaves your machine. Supports Rust, TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, Go, and Java.
